description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add 2 units of any audio visual mixer with at least 8 channels, a rating of 4 stars or higher, and a price under $500 to your cart.
tasks.name: Add 2 units of any audio visual mixer with at least 8 channels, a rating of 4 stars or higher, and a price under $500 to your cart.
tasks.description: Add 2 units of any audio visual mixer with at least 8 channels, a rating of 4 stars or higher, and a price under $500 to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Add to your cart a mixer under $700 that supports both Bluetooth and USB recording and has the highest number of channels among the filtered results, selecting a black finish if a color choice is offered.
tasks.name: Add to your cart a mixer under $700 that supports both Bluetooth and USB recording and has the highest number of channels among the filtered results, selecting a black finish if a color choice is offered.

tasks.instruction: On any mixer product page, build a bundle that includes the mixer itself, one carrying case priced under $80, and two different XLR cables each priced under $25, then add the bundle to your cart.

target_names: Soft Carry Case for 12–16 Channel Mixers

tasks.instruction: Compare one analog and one digital mixer that both have built-in effects and at least 12 channels, then add the cheaper one to your cart with a 3-year protection plan selected.

tasks.instruction: From mixers available for in-store pickup within 5 days for ZIP code 10001, add to your cart the mixer with the middle price among the first three results, choosing store pickup as the fulfillment option.

tasks.instruction: On a mixer that qualifies for financing, configure a 12-month payment plan so the estimated monthly payment is below $40, apply that plan, and add the mixer to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Find a live sound mixer rated at least 4 stars whose most recent customer review mentions a noise issue, then submit a Q&A question asking whether the noise affects all channels or just specific inputs.

expected_values.question_text: Does this mixer's noise issue affect all channels or just specific inputs?

criteria.question_text_pattern: noise issue affect all channels or just specific inputs

tasks.instruction: Add to your cart a mixer under $600 that has both XLR and 1/4" inputs, at least two aux outputs, and a listed weight of 15 lbs or less.

tasks.instruction: Add the first two mixers from the category listing to your cart, then move the cheaper one to your save-for-later or wishlist section while keeping the more expensive one in the active cart.
